title: Rebuild movie synchronized viewings
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild movie synchronized viewings [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by FLCL2 » Sun Jul 19, 2009 2:11 pm Me and Axell are trying to find people to do a synchronized viewing of the camrip of 2.0 on IRC tonight. How it works is everybody starts the movie at the same time, and we discuss what is going on in the movie as it appears. This happened quite a few times in #egf-rebuild on Rizon.net, with the regulars of the chan, but it would be better if more people joined us. Join us tonight at midnight EST on #letswatchrebuild on Rizon.net if you can make it. PS: I don't know if this counts as spam/advertising or not, but SSD said it should be okay.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 19, 2009 2:16 pm For those wondering I won't be able to watch the film myself tonight, I have too many other things going on. By the way, if this thread is against the rules or whatever I'll lock it.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sun Jul 19, 2009 2:25 pm For those who can't make it, maybe someone can save the conversation and post it later?

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sun Jul 19, 2009 2:42 pm I'll be there. I've got nothing better to do. (I mean that in a good way ;) )

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sun Jul 19, 2009 2:44 pm Will you guys do this again when we get subs?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Jul 19, 2009 2:45 pm I'm not watching that piece of shit camrip.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Jul 19, 2009 2:47 pm some of us couldnt go to Japan ornette :P

[]:             Quote Post by FLCL2 » Sun Jul 19, 2009 2:48 pm backseatjesus wrote: Will you guys do this again when we get subs?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 19, 2009 3:16 pm After reading the sorts of comments that just a small handful of people made while they watched it together, I'm staying the hell away from any future synchronized mIRC viewings. What's the point? Seriously. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by OKdesuKA » Sun Jul 19, 2009 3:28 pm Yeah I can only imagine the unparalleled exitement! NO U STUPID baka, Asuka is totally more tsundure in this HURRRRRR.

[]:             Quote Post by Rayshiest » Sun Jul 19, 2009 8:43 pm cough cough livestream cough

[]:             Quote Post by FLCL2 » Sun Jul 19, 2009 8:59 pm Rayshiest wrote: cough cough livestream cough

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Sun Jul 19, 2009 9:03 pm Reichu wrote: After reading the sorts of comments that just a small handful of people made while they watched it together, I'm staying the hell away from any future synchronized mIRC viewings. What's the point? Seriously. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Jul 19, 2009 9:10 pm o man, you fixed your own post :P

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jul 19, 2009 9:13 pm Ornette wrote: I'm not watching that piece of shit camrip.

[]:             Quote Post by FLCL2 » Sun Jul 19, 2009 11:04 pm After scrapping the Livestream idea (firefox crashed while uploading the movie), we're doing the manual syncing then. We're going to be starting the syncing in 5 minutes, for anybody else who wants to come join.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Jul 20, 2009 12:55 am night well speant

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Mon Jul 20, 2009 8:56 am seconded

[]:             Quote Post by FLCL2 » Mon Jul 20, 2009 11:57 am Even though there were only three of us, it was fun. If anybody wants to, we can do it tomorrow sometime during the day with 1.11.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Mon Jul 20, 2009 12:10 pm i'm game...but i'd prefer it if it was like noon-ish (central time)
